For lab members

Member Portal

Current BIRD Lab members manage day-to-day work in our private Notion workspace.

The member portal is our internal Notion workspace. It holds private, members-only material — onboarding guides, operational checklists, internal trackers, schedules, and contact details — and is not part of the public site.

Lab members: open the workspace below. Access is managed in Notion; if you need to be added, email harvey@ucdavis.edu.

Open the Notion workspace →

Looking for lab policies?

Much of our guidance is public. The Lab Guide covers how we work, communicate, run journal club, attend conferences, request time off, and find support resources — open to anyone considering joining.

Bio-Informed Research & Design Lab

Department of Mechanical & Aerospace Engineering, UC Davis, Davis, CA
